untranslatable_reason: Base consolidation identification (45-60 day range with defined upper/lower boundaries) cannot be directly expressed using the allowed indicators. The signal requires explicit range detection logic that would need custom indicator computation. Volume confirmation condition simplified to vol_ratio_20 as a proxy for the 120% of 20-day average requirement.
translation_notes: Used Donchian Channel upper band (dc_upper) as a proxy for the consolidation base upper boundary breakout. The 2% breakout threshold and precise 45-60 day base duration identification would require custom logic beyond the available indicator set. Volume ratio simplified to available vol_ratio_20 indicator. The trailing stop and time-based exit are captured in stop_loss_pct and hold_days_max parameters.
